results.title: ‘Mountain Man’ Jigme Tenzin conquers Snowman Trek in record five days
results.description: Bhutanese ultra-marathoner Jigme Tenzin, widely known among his peers as the “Mountain Man”, has set the fastest known time on Bhutan’s legendary Snowman Trek. He completed the gruelling 268-kilometre route in a record-breaking five days.

results.title: Close contests highlight Vanua round three
results.description: Round Three of the Vodafone Vanua Championship delivered several closely contested encounters across the country today, with Macuata, Ra, Northland, Serua and Ovalau emerging victorious in the senior competition. At Ratu Ganilau Park, Macuata edged Cakaudrove 22-20 in one of the day’s most competitive matches, while Vatukoula and Tavua could not be separated after playing [...]

results.title: Mets Must Sell Assets Before Deadline Chaos Hits
results.description: The New York Mets are officially becoming sellers at the trade deadline, and league sources confirm the front office is making calls right now. This move comes at the perfect time for the franchise.

results.title: Experience thwarts Jimmy-Su Yin fairytale run at Japan Open
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Experience ultimately proved the decisive factor as mixed doubles Jimmy Wong-Cheng Su Yin's fairytale run was halted by Tang Chun Man-Tse Ying Suet at the Japan Open semi-finals on Saturday.

results.title: Maple Leafs Rielly Reportedly Adds Music City to Trade List
results.description: Toronto Maple Leafs defenseman Morgan Rielly reportedly added a Western Conference team to his supposed trade list. The post Maple Leafs Rielly Reportedly Adds Music City to Trade List appeared first on HEAVY.

results.title: How Argentina May Use Lionel Messi Differently Against Spain in World Cup Final
results.description: Argentina face their toughest challenge against Spain in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final. Lionel Scaloni may need tactical changes, including a deeper role for Lionel Messi, to break Spain's midfield dominance.

results.title: Archie Goodburn: A medal at G2026 would be huge given everything I've been through
results.description: A medal at Glasgow 2026 would be huge given everything I've been through, says swimmer Archie Goodburn, who was diagnosed with brain cancer two years ago
